title: Mummy & Mini Love Heart Mug Set Coffee Tea Mug Mummy Cup Mother’s Day Gift Birthday Gift New Mummy Gift for New Present Christmas Mummy 36cl & Mini 17.5cl
features: Coordinated Mugs: The set contains two mugs—one larger "Mummy" mug for parents and one smaller "Mini" mug tailored for children. Together, they create a heartwarming pairing that symbolizes the bond between parent and child, making it an excellent gift for families.

Stoneware: Made from high-quality stoneware, these mugs are designed to last. The matte finish adds a modern, sophisticated look, while the silk text on each mug provides a gentle and elegant touch that enhances their overall aesthetic.

Perfectly Sized: With thoughtful attention to practicality, the "Mummy" mug offers a generous capacity of approximately 36cl, suitable for a hearty morning drink. Meanwhile, the "Mini" mug holds 17.5cl, just the right size for little hands and their favourite beverages.

Mug Set: This charming set is a perfect addition to any children's collection. Designed with a delightful combination of pink and blue stoneware, the mugs feature reversed inner colourways that add a playful and visually appealing touch. Ideal for starting the day with early morning drinks and meaningful conversations around the breakfast table, this set brings warmth and connection to family moments.

Care Instructions: To preserve their quality and charm, these mugs are not suitable for use in the microwave or dishwasher. Handwashing is recommended to maintain their matte finish and delicate detailing, ensuring they remain a cherished part of your daily routine.
Includes 1 x Keyring - Sometimes you forget You're Awesome so this is your Reminder.
